name: The Shadowed Threshold
description: A chill air wafts from the yawning entrance of this ancient stone chamber. Flickering torchlight casts dancing shadows on weathered walls adorned with faded glyphs. The sound of distant dripping water echoes ominously from deeper within.

setting_data.atmosphere: An oppressive sense of age and forgotten secrets permeates the air, setting nerves on edge.

npcs.name: Vex the Scout
npcs.description: A lithe figure in dark leather armor, with sharp eyes and a wary expression. A collection of lockpicks and small knives adorns their belt.
npcs.backstory: Vex makes a living guiding adventurers through dangerous ruins. They've seen many groups enter this dungeon, but few return.

objects.label: Ancient Stone Door
objects.description: A massive stone door covered in intricate, worn carvings.

objects.label: Flickering Torch
objects.description: A torch mounted on the wall, its flame casting eerie shadows.

objects.label: Crumbling Pillar
objects.description: A partially collapsed stone pillar, once ornate but now worn by time.

objects.label: Mysterious Glyph
objects.description: A faintly glowing symbol etched into the stone wall.

objects.label: Discarded Backpack
objects.description: A worn leather backpack, seemingly abandoned by a previous explorer.
